description.value:
Requirements You have a creature grappled or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Restrained] using one or more active limbs.

You use all of your available limbs to hold on tight. You use your second pair of arms to hold on to the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed] or restrained target. If you're in quadrupedal posture, you automatically @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Change Posture] to bipedal as part of this action. The grabbed creature takes a –2 circumstance penalty to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Escape] being grabbed by you until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Multi-Armed Grab]
